message:
security(deps): Update vulnerable npm dependencies to secure versions

Critical & High-Severity Fixes:
- @modelcontextprotocol/sdk: ^1.20.1 → ^1.24.0 (GHSA-w48q-cv73-mx4w: DNS rebinding protection enabled)

Moderate-Severity Fixes:
- body-parser: Updated to latest patch (GHSA-wqch-xfxh-vrr4: DoS prevention)
- esbuild: ^0.24.2 → ^0.25.11 (GHSA-67mh-4wv8-2f99: Server response leak)
- vite: Updated to latest compatible version
- vitest: ^2.1.8 → ^4.0.15 (breaking change, test suite verified)
- vite-node: Updated to latest compatible version

Audit Results:
✅ All vulnerabilities resolved
✅ Zero critical severity issues
✅ Zero high-severity issues
✅ Unit test suite passing
✅ All direct dependencies updated to secure versions

Dependency Changes:
- Upgraded 16 packages
- Removed 10 vulnerable sub-dependencies
- Added 7 secure transitive dependencies
- Final audit: 0 vulnerabilities found

Note: Pre-existing TypeScript compilation errors in AgentDB.ts and
quic-sync-example.ts are unrelated to this security update.

Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
